mySkills.createFirst: Create your first skill to get started
mySkills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

skillDetail.author: Author
skillDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
skillDetail.notFoundDesc: The skill you are looking for does not exist.

playground.selectSkill: Select a skill to try in the playground.
playground.fillEnvVars: Fill in the required environment variables on the right to start chatting.
playground.askAbout: Ask me anything about "{{name}}" or tell me to run it.
playground.envVarsDesc: This skill requires the following environment variables. Fill them in before chatting.
playground.fillFirst: Fill in env vars to start chatting...
playground.askPlaceholder: Ask about "{{name}}" or tell me to run it...

upload.chooseMode: Choose how you want to create your skill
upload.guidedDesc: Step-by-step wizard that guides you through creating a skill. Perfect for beginners or structured authoring.
upload.freeDesc: Upload a pre-built skill package as a ZIP file. Best for experienced authors with existing skills.
upload.genDesc: Describe what you need and let AI generate a complete skill for you. Refine with chat.

guided.headerDesc: Follow the steps below to create a new skill
guided.descPlaceholder: A brief description of what this skill does (min 10 chars)
guided.runtimeDepsHelper: npm packages required by runtime scripts (e.g., axios, lodash)
guided.disableModelInvocationDesc: Prevent the AI from invoking this skill as a sub-model call
guided.userInvocableDesc: Allow users to directly invoke this skill
guided.allowedToolsHelper: Tools this skill is allowed to use (Claude spec)
guided.contextPathsHelper: File paths to include as context for the skill
guided.argumentHintPlaceholder: Provide a file path or URL
guided.contentDesc: Write the body content for your SKILL.md. This will appear below the auto-generated YAML frontmatter.
guided.contentPlaceholder:
# My Skill

Describe what this skill does, how to use it, and provide examples...
guided.filesDesc: Upload script files, reference docs, or assets to specific folders. SKILL.md is auto-generated from your metadata and content.
guided.dropHint: Drop file here or click to browse

generative.title: GENERATE SKILL
generative.desc: Describe the skill you need and AI will generate it for you. You can refine it with follow-up messages.
generative.note: Generated skills are plain or runtime-based only.
generative.emptyPreview: Generate a skill to preview its contents
generative.fixErrors: Fix frontmatter validation errors before saving

free.title: UPLOAD SKILL PACKAGE
free.subtitle: Upload a pre-built skill as a .zip file
free.dropzone: Drag & drop a .zip file or click to browse
free.validWithErrors: Package structure is valid, but frontmatter has validation errors. Fix them before uploading.
free.tooLarge: File exceeds the maximum size of 50 MB ({{size}}).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account
settings.accountDesc: Your profile, LLM credentials, and security settings are managed through NyxID.

login.desc: Sign in with your NyxID account to access the platform.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

notFound.message: This sector of the grid does not exist.

skillToggle.makePrivateDesc: Are you sure you want to make this skill private? Other users will no longer be able to view it.
skillToggle.makePublicDesc: Are you sure you want to make this skill public? All users will be able to view it.
skillToggle.nowPrivate: Skill is now private. Only you can view it.
skillToggle.nowPublic: Skill is now public. All users can view it.

chatInput.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)

landing.heroDesc: Ornn is the industry-standard skill registry for AI agents. Standardized, verifiable, and executable capabilities for the next generation of autonomous intelligence.
landing.showcaseDesc: Browse the most-used capabilities in the registry.
landing.frameworkDesc: Ornn isn't just a list; it's a protocol. A standardized way for AI agents to discover, verify, and execute capabilities across any environment.
landing.feature1Desc: Every skill runs in an isolated, auditable sandbox.
landing.feature3Desc: One line to discover. One line to execute.
